description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called build and a job named build_project. In the build stage run the script commands: `xcodebuild clean -workspace Neuralyzer.xcworkspace -scheme Neuralyzer | xcpretty` and `xcodebuild test -workspace Neuralyzer.xcworkspace -scheme Neuralyzer -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 7' | tee xcodebuild.log | xcpretty -s`. Capture the generated xcodebuild.log as an artifact. Use the default runner image.
